title: Template for an Emergency Operations Center
excerpt: I run an emergency operations center and am looking for a good template to start from. Can anyone suggest a template? Thanks in advance.

posts.author: LukeA (Luke Aurner)
posts.cookedHtml: I run an emergency operations center and am looking for a good template to start from. Can anyone suggest a template? Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t think there is a template for that, but I think it would be easy enough to create. I’ve worked in a PSAP environment before, what kind of data are you trying to collect?

posts.author: LukeA (Luke Aurner)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking to collect essential elements of information, track status of resources, send messages, and update as we go. I want to use it as a tracking and information system as well as track position specific objectives. I know I am asking a lot but it seems this is the right platform for it.
thanks

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: It can all be done in Monday, but I’d recommend starting from scratch. I don’t know of a template for that. Create a new board and then start adding columns to test out ideas of what works.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree with Desiree, it can definitely be done in monday.com. There’s a basic service desk template that might form a good base from too. But it sounds like starting from scratch would be the best approach, so you can tailor everything.

I follow this monday profile on Linkedin, I wonder if there’s any specific help you can leverage from this team too.

The monday.com Emergency Response Team (ERT) partners with humanitarian NGOs and governmental agencies to help enhance their impact during emergencies, through donating digital emergency products and technical expertise and services.

Website

mondayert.org

MondayERT

posts.author: hgrieb (Hal Grieb I Monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Howdy, Luke was this ever resolved? I just stumbled upon this today. I am a former county emergency management director and now 2025 Monday.com ambassador. I have used monday.com for Emergency Operations Center management and other EM needs for years. I would be happy to chat if you need additional support. Reference: Monday.com Alachua County EOC User Story
